description: CompositionBrown shirt with black pinstripes and light brown polka dots, made of 100% cotton, has a tipped collar and full front button placket, full cuff sleeves, patch pocket on left chest and a curved hemFittingRegularWash careMachine wash at 40 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry on normal or line dryWarm ironFormal clothes don't have to be boring! Make your weekdays fun by donning this formal striped shirt from genesis. This shirt looks fresh and crisp, and the fabric will keep you fresh all day long, while the long sleeves are sure to keep the winter chill at bay. Pair it with well-fitting formal trousers and a pair of leather shoes to take the office by storm!Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
